name: Parthenon Federal Credit Union
description_short: Parthenon Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering checking, savings, loans, and insurance products with online and mobile banking access.
description_long:
Parthenon Federal Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union providing comprehensive financial services to its member base. The institution positions itself as a safe, convenient, and affordable alternative to banks, emphasizing personalized service and member-focused financial solutions.

The credit union offers a full suite of deposit products including share accounts (savings), Christmas Club and Vacation Club accounts, specialized youth accounts (Kid Account for ages 13 and under, Teen Account for ages 13-20), Share Certificates, IRA Accounts, and Money Market Accounts. For borrowing needs, they provide auto loans (new and used vehicles), first and second mortgages, home equity lines of credit, signature loans, specialty loans for motorcycles/campers/boats, and credit cards. Convenience services include direct deposit, free notary service, free bill pay, free online banking, wire transfers, money orders, and an audio response unit called "Marilyn."

Parthenon FCU distinguishes itself through member-centric features such as a referral program offering $25 bonuses to both referrer and new member, specialized youth savings accounts encouraging early financial literacy, and free ancillary services like notary and bill pay that many institutions charge for. They also offer insurance products including credit life, credit disability, auto insurance, home insurance, life insurance, and GAP coverage.

The credit union maintains standard regulatory compliance including Regulation D transfer limits (6 electronic transfers monthly with $10 fees for excess) and member liability protections. As a credit union rather than a bank, membership eligibility may be restricted by field of membership criteria not detailed on their public website. Their online presence is functional but basic, lacking detailed rate information and advanced digital banking features found at larger institutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free bill pay and online banking services
Specialized youth savings accounts (Kid Account, Teen Account, Lullaby Club) promoting financial literacy
$25 referral bonus program for both referrer and new member
Comprehensive lending products including mortgages, auto loans, HELOCs, and specialty loans
Multiple insurance products bundled with accounts (credit life, credit disability, auto, home, life)
Surcharge-free ATM locator tool for convenient cash access
cons: Regulation D limits restrict members to 6 electronic transfers monthly from savings accounts with $10 fees per excess transfer
Website lacks transparent rate information—members must visit site or contact institution for current rates
No information provided about field of membership eligibility criteria, suggesting restricted access
Limited digital banking features compared to modern neobanks and larger financial institutions
Monthly account monitoring requirement imposed on members (stated policy: 'YOU MUST CHECK YOUR ACCOUNT BALANCE EVERY MONTH')
best_for: Families seeking youth savings accounts and financial education products for children
Members eligible for credit union field of membership seeking comprehensive mortgage and auto lending
Borrowers preferring credit union structure with member referral incentives and free ancillary services
Consumers in need of bundled insurance products alongside banking and lending services
diagnosis: Parthenon Federal Credit Union is best suited for existing or newly eligible members seeking comprehensive banking, lending, and insurance products within a credit union framework. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility appears restricted by field of membership criteria not publicly disclosed, and Regulation D transfer limits (6 per month) may frustrate savers who make frequent transfers.
services: Christmas Club, Vacation Club, and Lullaby Club (specialty savings)
Kid Account and Teen Account (youth savings)
Free Bill Pay and Online Banking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2290 Rosa L Parks Blvd, Nashville, TN 37228
